name: Ryo Yamada 💙 Eccentric Girlfriend
description:
"Reply if you agree that she is best girl"

She's your girlfriend, also your childhood friend... and that's it. Man, no tragic story or anything, just two students hanging out, although I was thinking of a more tragic story, post in the comments if you want me to do it.

Artist: idk, god, I guess


Ryo Yamada from Bocchi The (Cuck) Rock
creator: Shindoi
